objective: Map Google Chrome workflows for safe browsing automation: navigation, tabs, basic settings, and content interaction without logins or real submissions.
automation_hierarchy: If a web API exists for the task, use that (WEB_API skill).
If no API exists but the task can be performed programmatically on files, create a Python Sandbox skill (metadata.sandbox) and run it in E2B.
If neither exists, fall back to UI automation via clicking/typing.
constraints: Use a dedicated test profile if available; do not sign into personal accounts
Do not enter credentials anywhere; avoid any pages requiring login
Do not submit forms that send messages, purchases, or real-world requests
Prefer safe test destinations: about:blank, chrome://settings, https://example.com, https://www.wikipedia.org
Avoid downloading executables; if download flow is tested, use harmless files only and a dedicated download folder
Prefer stable UI selectors (omnibox, tab strip, menus); avoid OCR unless necessary

downloads_files: verify a downloaded item appears (only safe files)
